subject: Trying to create stacks for IMOD-invert tilt angles issue
body:
Hello,

Whenever I try to export my tilt series to IMOD after doing motion 
correction and CTF estimation in WARP, the .rawtlt and the .st files are in 
the opposite order of my raw tilt series that is directly from Serial EM. 
I've tried combinations of checking the "don't invert tilt angle" button 
along with checking the handedness of the tilt series, but nothing seems to 
export a .st file or a .rawtlt file that matches the order of my original, 
raw tilt series. It almost seems to be ignoring the order in my .mdoc file. 
Will WARP recognize that its output is "backwards" from my original data, 
(so I could safely apply IMOD alignments that I have done on the original 
tilt series to the WARP'd data, and reconstruct my tilt series in WARP)? 
We're running version 1.0.9. Thank you for your help!

Thanks,
Jess

Jessica Rabuck-Gibbons, PhD
Postdoctoral Associate | Williamson Lab | The Scripps Research Institute
